executive_summary: Build failure detected in repository scib_new on branch main. Multiple consecutive build attempts (1-3) have failed. The build system is experiencing persistent failures that require immediate attention. Based on the failure pattern and GitHub Actions workflow dispatch errors, this appears to be a CONFIGURATION_ERROR related to workflow execution.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow Dispatch Failure
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow failed to execute properly across multiple attempts. The build.yml workflow is not completing successfully, indicating a configuration or infrastructure issue.
errors.error_message: Build process failed - GitHub Actions workflow execution error. Action URL: https://github.com/loginkarun/scib_new/actions/runs/22731593043
errors.root_cause: Workflow configuration error or infrastructure issue preventing successful build execution. Possible causes: (1) Invalid workflow YAML syntax, (2) Missing required secrets or environment variables, (3) GitHub Actions runner availability issues, (4) Workflow dispatch API errors.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline blockage. No builds can complete successfully, preventing code integration and deployment. This affects the entire development workflow and blocks all downstream processes.

errors.title: Persistent Build Failure Pattern
errors.description: Three consecutive build attempts have failed with the same error pattern, indicating a systemic issue rather than a transient failure.
errors.error_message: Build failed - see action URL for details. Attempts: 1, 2, 3 all failed with identical error patterns.
errors.root_cause: The consistent failure pattern across multiple attempts suggests: (1) Source code compilation errors not being resolved, (2) Missing dependencies in pom.xml, (3) Test failures blocking build completion, (4) Maven configuration issues, or (5) Environment setup problems in the workflow.
errors.impact: Development velocity severely impacted. Code changes cannot be validated through automated builds. Risk of accumulating technical debt and integration issues.

errors.title: Build Log Accessibility Issue
errors.description: Detailed build logs are not being captured or stored properly, making it difficult to diagnose the root cause of failures.
errors.error_message: Build logs contain generic failure message without detailed Maven output or stack traces.
errors.root_cause: The build logging mechanism is not capturing detailed Maven output, compilation errors, or test failure details. This could be due to: (1) Workflow logging configuration issues, (2) Log truncation or size limits, (3) Improper error handling in the build script.
errors.impact: Reduced debugging capability. Engineers cannot quickly identify and fix build issues without detailed error information. This increases mean time to resolution (MTTR) for build failures.

recommended_actions.details: Review .github/workflows/build.yml for syntax errors, missing required inputs, or incorrect job configurations. Ensure all required secrets (GITHUB_TOKEN, etc.) are properly configured.
Add -X or --debug flag to Maven commands in the workflow to capture detailed build output. Ensure logs are properly captured and stored.

recommended_actions.action: Review source code in code/ folder
recommended_actions.details: Check for compilation errors, missing dependencies in pom.xml, or failing tests that could be blocking the build.
Check GitHub Actions status page and runner availability. Consider using self-hosted runners if public runners are experiencing issues.
Set up automated alerts for build failures to reduce response time and improve visibility.

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failures logged across attempts 1-3. All failure events recorded with timestamps and action URLs for compliance tracking.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No immediate security vulnerabilities identified. Build failures prevent deployment of potentially vulnerable code, which is a positive security control.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: Build failure tracking meets audit requirements for change management and deployment controls.

next_steps: Immediate investigation required. Review workflow configuration and enable detailed logging to capture specific Maven errors. Escalate to DevOps team if infrastructure issues are suspected.
